Why Starburst Is Still Worth Playing in 2026

Starburst has spent over 14 years in the top-ten most-played slots globally — not out of nostalgia, but because the core mechanics still deliver. No bloated bonus rounds, no convoluted rules. Just a slot that does a few things very well and gives you room to breathe between sessions.

What makes it work is the combination of Win Both Ways and the Expanding Wild. When the Wild lands on reels 2, 3, or 4, it fills the entire reel and locks it while the remaining reels re-spin — up to three times in a row. That re-spin chain is the game's defining moment and it happens often enough to keep low-volatility sessions interesting.

For South African players, the low minimum bet of approximately R1.80 makes Starburst practical. A R200 session budget gives you well over 100 spins, with no app download or installation required — it runs directly in your mobile browser on any Android or iOS device.

The honest caveat: a maximum win of 500× your stake is modest compared to modern slots with 5,000× or 10,000× potential. There is no bonus round, no scatter, no multiplier trail. But that simplicity is precisely the point. Starburst is one of the most consistent, bankroll-friendly slots available in 2026.

Read the full review →

Starburst Key Features

Expanding Wild

The Starburst Wild lands on reels 2, 3, or 4 and expands to fill the entire reel — triggering a free re-spin.

Re-Spins (up to 3×)

Each Wild expansion locks the reel and triggers a re-spin. A chain of three re-spins with locked Wilds is the biggest moment the game offers.

Win Both Ways

All 10 paylines evaluate symbols left-to-right and right-to-left — effectively 20 win opportunities per spin.

Low Volatility

Hit frequency of 22.6% means roughly one win in every five spins. Your bankroll lasts longer than on high-variance titles.

Mobile Optimised

HTML5 build runs in any mobile browser on Android or iOS. No app download. No installation. Full game on any screen.

Certified Fair

NetEnt's RNG is audited by eCOGRA and iTech Labs. RTP 96.09% verified across billions of spins.

How to Play Starburst

  1. 1

    Choose a Casino

    Pick a licensed SA operator with ZAR deposits. 1win carries the full NetEnt catalogue with a welcome bonus for new players.

  2. 2

    Find the Game

    Search "Starburst" in the slots lobby. Or try the free demo on this page first — no account needed.

  3. 3

    Set Your Bet

    Starburst runs from R1.80 to R1,800 per spin. A sensible starting point is 1–2% of your session budget per spin.

  4. 4

    Watch Reels 2, 3 and 4

    That's where the Wild can land. When it does, it expands to fill the reel and triggers a re-spin — the most exciting moment in the game.

  5. 5

    Set Your Limits

    Decide your session budget and stop point before you spin. Starburst's fast pace makes it easy to play longer than planned.

Starburst Strategy Tips

No strategy changes Starburst's RTP or guarantees wins. What does make a real difference is how you manage your bankroll across a session.

Flat Betting

Stake the same amount every spin. It extends your session and keeps bankroll depletion predictable.

Session Budget

Decide your limit before the first spin. At R1.80 minimum, R200 gives you 100+ spins of actual play.

Use the Demo

Run 50–100 demo spins before playing for real. See how often Wilds land and what re-spin chains feel like.

Read the full strategy guide →

Frequently Asked Questions

Does Starburst pay real money?

Yes — at licensed real-money casinos. Demo mode uses virtual credits only. Switch to real-money play and every win pays out in ZAR to your casino balance.

What is the Starburst RTP?

The standard RTP is 96.09% — above the industry average. Some casinos run a lower configuration. Always check the in-game paytable before playing.

Does Starburst have free spins?

Not in the traditional sense. Instead of a free spins bonus round, Starburst uses a re-spin mechanic triggered by the expanding Wild — up to three consecutive re-spins.

What is the maximum win on Starburst?

500× your total bet per spin. At R1,800 (maximum stake) that's R900,000. In practice, the biggest wins come from three locked Wild reels paying in both directions.

Can I play Starburst on mobile in South Africa?

Yes. It runs fully in your mobile browser on Android and iOS — no download needed. The layout adapts cleanly to phone screens in both portrait and landscape.

Is Starburst low or high volatility?

Low volatility. Hit frequency is 22.6% — roughly one win in every five spins. Wins are frequent but smaller. Ideal for players who prefer longer, steadier sessions.

What is the minimum bet on Starburst?

Approximately R1.80 per spin at most ZAR casinos (converted from £0.10 base). Maximum bet is approximately R1,800 per spin.
